feed.title: TT / Aero control add-ons
feed.subtitle: VukaShift bar-end shifters and Blips — pair with your road groupset feed of choice.

entry.title: VukaShift 90 (L) (EC-AXS-ZIPP-A1) — firmware 2.53.2
entry.summary:
VukaShift 90 (L) EC-AXS-ZIPP-A1 — firmware 2.53.2

Part: VukaShift 90 (L)

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version from the app store to activate the following improvements.  This firmware update contains minor bug fixes, platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements

Released: 2025-09-17

entry.title: WIRELESS BLIP (EC-BLIP-B1) — firmware 2.49.1
entry.summary:
WIRELESS BLIP EC-BLIP-B1 — firmware 2.49.1

Part: Wireless Blip

* Minor Bug Fixes, Platform updates and reliability improvements * Default shift assignment added for wireless blips

Released: 2024-05-29

entry.title: VukaShift 90 (L) (EC-AXS-ZIPP-A1) — firmware 2.49.1
entry.summary:
VukaShift 90 (L) EC-AXS-ZIPP-A1 — firmware 2.49.1

Part: VukaShift 90 (L)

* Minor Bug Fixes, Platform updates and reliability improvements * Default shift assignment added for wireless blips

Released: 2024-05-29

entry.title: WIRELESS BLIP (EC-BLIP-B1) — firmware 2.42.0
entry.summary:
WIRELESS BLIP EC-BLIP-B1 — firmware 2.42.0

Part: Wireless Blip

General bug fixes and reliability improvements.

Released: 2023-01-12

entry.title: VukaShift 90 (L) (EC-AXS-ZIPP-A1) — firmware 2.42.0
entry.summary:
VukaShift 90 (L) EC-AXS-ZIPP-A1 — firmware 2.42.0

entry.title: VukaShift 90 (L) (EC-AXS-ZIPP-A1) — firmware 2.29.6
entry.summary:
VukaShift 90 (L) EC-AXS-ZIPP-A1 — firmware 2.29.6

Part: VukaShift 90 (L)

* Fixed bug: rapidly pressing Clics or Blips prevents derailleur(s) from actuating * Fixed bug: pressing and holding a brake-shift lever AXS button for an extended period can unpair shifter from system

Released: 2022-02-07

entry.title: VukaShift 90 (L) (EC-AXS-ZIPP-A1) — firmware 2.3.6
entry.summary:
VukaShift 90 (L) EC-AXS-ZIPP-A1 — firmware 2.3.6

Part: VukaShift 90 (L)

Resolved issue with high battery consumption in some units.

Released: 2020-06-12
